overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses busy intersections with moderate traffic, and ascends to an elevated walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway, following pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in same direction

entered.detail: massive red steel highway structure spanning overhead with support beams
large illuminated advertisement screen showing colorful animated content
tall vertical neon signs in pink and cyan colors on building facade
modern glass building with reflective windows and neon accents
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive red elevated highway structure. Neon signs in pink and cyan illuminate the left side while a modern glass building stands on the right. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

events.description: steps from covered sidewalk onto open intersection crosswalk
pauses at center of crosswalk to allow vehicles to pass through intersection
resumes crossing after traffic clears and reaches opposite side

agents.ego_description: crossing wide intersection using zebra crosswalk, pausing mid-way to wait for passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through intersection crossing the crosswalk
pedestrian in white shirt and jeans crossing alongside ego

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
open center area of the intersection where roads meet

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open intersection with a yellow zebra crosswalk. After pausing midway to let a white sedan pass, the character continues crossing. The elevated highway structure now appears in the distance while traffic lights and crossing signals dominate the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with parked vehicles and storefronts

events.description: completes crossing and turns onto sidewalk along commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking along street-level sidewalk past parked cars and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near building entrance looking at storefront

entered.detail: large teal neon sign reading 'NCART' indicating transit station entrance
building facade decorated with large pink circular neon lights
blue awning extending over sidewalk with neon trim
dark building facade with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with parked vehicles. A prominent NCART transit sign glows teal on the left, while a building with distinctive pink circular neon lights dominates the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with staircase to upper level

events.description: approaches building entrance with yellow-railed staircase leading upward
begins ascending the staircase to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing yellow-railed staircase to upper level

entered.detail: concrete staircase with bright yellow railings leading upward
dark entrance to building with neon green vertical lights
illuminated green vending machine at top of stairs with 'CHOOH2' branding
bright yellow handrails lining both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a building entrance featuring a prominent staircase with bright yellow railings. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character begins ascending the stairs toward an upper level, passing a green illuminated vending machine at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters elevated pedestrian walkway with view of street below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated pedestrian walkway with views of street traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking opposite direction on walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway at elevated level
yellow safety railing along edge of elevated walkway
large digital screens mounted on overhead structures displaying advertisements
massive curved digital billboard spanning across the walkway overhead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with yellow safety railings and views of the street below. Large digital billboards and screens dominate the overhead space. The character passes a green vending machine and continues along the concrete walkway as another pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered street level to an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins beneath a massive red highway structure, moving along a crowded sidewalk illuminated by pink and cyan neon signs and flanked by a modern glass building. As the character enters a wide intersection, the scene opens up across a yellow zebra crosswalk where a white sedan passes before the camera continues toward a commercial strip lined with parked cars and a glowing teal NCART sign. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches a building entrance and ascends a staircase with bright yellow railings, passing a green vending machine at the top. Finally, the view expands onto a high concrete walkway dominated by overhead digital billboards, overlooking the street below as another pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction.
